title: Tick Control in Park Slope, Brooklyn | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Park Slope, Brooklyn. Protect your family and pets from tick-borne illnesses. Licensed exterminators. Call for same-day service!
intro: Park Slope's tree-lined streets, beautiful brownstones, and proximity to Prospect Park create an ideal environment for outdoor living—but also for ticks. Our professional tick control services protect Park Slope families and pets from dangerous tick-borne diseases like Lyme disease and Rocky Mountain spotted fever. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive tick treatments tailored to your property's specific needs, from small backyards to larger garden spaces.
whyUs: As Park Slope's trusted pest control experts, we understand the unique challenges of tick control in Brooklyn's urban green spaces. Our EPA-approved treatments are safe for children and pets, and our technicians are trained to target tick habitats in yards, gardens, and around brownstone perimeters where these pests thrive.
localContext: Park Slope residents enjoy easy access to Prospect Park, the Long Meadow, and numerous tree-lined streets perfect for dog walking—all areas where ticks are commonly found. Our tick control service protects backyards, front gardens, and the outdoor spaces surrounding Park Slope's historic brownstones and multi-family homes, ensuring your family can safely enjoy this beautiful Brooklyn neighborhood.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: Park Slope's proximity to Prospect Park and abundance of trees and gardens make it a high-risk area for ticks. Ticks can carry Lyme disease, anaplasmosis, and other serious illnesses. Regular tick control protects your family and pets, especially if you frequent the park or have a backyard where pets and children play.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Park Slope?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Park Slope range from $125 to $325, depending on your property size, the severity of the tick problem, and whether you need a one-time treatment or seasonal protection. We provide free estimates and can customize a treatment plan that fits your budget and needs.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Ticks are most active in Brooklyn from April through October, with peak activity in late spring and early summer. However, ticks can be present whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend starting treatments in early spring before tick populations peak and continuing through fall for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We typically recommend keeping pets and children off treated areas for 2-4 hours after application until surfaces dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used.
